channel.title: Shubham Singh | Software Engineer
channel.description: SDE II at Amazon building production agentic AI systems and distributed infrastructure on AWS.

item.title: Designing interfaces for agentic systems
item.description: Agentic products need interfaces for supervision, correction, evidence, and safe control. A practical guide to designing UI surfaces for systems that plan, call tools, revise artifacts, and sometimes need to stop.

item.title: Writing an HLD that survives cross-team review
item.description: Most high-level design documents are skimmed, signed, and forgotten. The ones that survive are written for specific readers, not a generic reviewer. Here is what changes when you take that seriously.

item.title: Error isolation for batch pipelines: when fail-fast is wrong
item.description: Standard data-engineering advice says validate strictly, fail loudly, and replay. That advice is wrong for any pipeline where one bad record cannot be allowed to block the run. Here is the pattern that replaces it.

item.title: The schema problem in LLM outputs
item.description: Structured output from LLMs is treated as a solved problem. It is not. The JSON looks right, but the contract underneath is fragile in ways that only show up under volume. Here is what actually has to be true at the boundary.

item.title: Agentic systems, explained from first principles
item.description: A plain-English map of agents, tools, MCP servers, streaming responses, agent frameworks, runtime infrastructure, memory, state, and the engineering choices that make agentic systems production-ready.

item.title: Human feedback is not a chat message
item.description: In production agent systems, human feedback should be modeled as a structured state transition, not appended to a conversation transcript.

item.title: What production agents need that demos do not
item.description: The gap between an impressive agent demo and a trustworthy production system is not model intelligence. It is state, tools, evals, permissions, observability, retries, and human feedback design.

item.title: Hybrid retrieval at scale: BM25 + kNN tradeoffs
item.description: When to reach for vector search, when keyword retrieval still wins, and the architectural decisions behind a citation-grounded compliance Q&A system.

item.title: From chained Lambdas to Step Functions
item.description: A migration retrospective: why brittle orchestration patterns fail at scale, how Map states unlocked per-marketplace parallelism, and what we would do differently.
